MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: K. Liu ; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Postrel Family Exemption Trust is present. Represented by Rivka Postrel.
Attorney Jeffrey Margulies appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendants Sara Miller, Kenyata King, Andre Miller, Kenneth King and Naomi King are present.
Attorney Umung D. Varma representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Paul Renne, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions. This case did NOT settle. The trial date of APR-02-2012 remains on calendar.(501)
